display_information.name: Tandem
display_information.description: Your team's AI coworker in Slack — tag @Tandem in any channel. Powered by the Cursor CLI and PM OS.
display_information.long_description: Tandem is the Slack surface of your ambient AI coworker. Mention @Tandem or DM it to run tasks against your PM OS workspace. Same brain as Pip (desktop) and Lens (browser).
